title: スペシャルウィーク登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My journey to take on the Twinkle Series with
Special Week finally begins today!
choice_data_list:
I'll do whatever it takes to help make Spe's
dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Full of enthusiasm, I head to the cafeteria for
lunch, when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Hmm, I think I have space for a little more.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Excuse meee! Another helping, please!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh, she wants more?! She's eating a literal ton of food! She's not just on another level, she's on another scale entirely!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
This is a disaster! Not only is the pantry
completely empty, the vegetables from the
academy farm are gone too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems awfully noisy inside, and an unusual
crowd is gathering.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wow... another one? She usually eats a lot, but
this is a bit much.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Just watching her eat is giving me
heartburn.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What a sight to behold. You can barely even see
her behind that mountain of plates.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The crowd's getting bigger. It's like we're at an
event! Nya-ha-ha!
choice_data_list: (What in the world is going on?)
(What in the world is going on?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look beyond the great pile of plates in the
middle of everyone to find...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gulp! Hmmm, I've still got room for more!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Excuse meee! Two more helpings of this dish,
please!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, hello Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, sorry for startling you earlier!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When I realized that our quest for the Twinkle
Series started today...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I just couldn't sit still! I could feel my fighting
spirit burning up in my belly!
choice_data_list: So that's why you were eating up a storm?
So that's why you were eating up a storm?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yup! I'm all fired up and ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Just saying, I-I'm totally gonna burn all this
off in training!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna be carrying a lot of extra weight
this early on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'd need an absurd amount of training to burn
all that off, but I decide not to mention it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty, time to start our trai—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wait a minute! There's something I wanted to
show you first!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yup!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Here. It's a letter to you from my mom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The letter is very politely written. It expresses
gratitude for looking after Special Week and asks
that I "help her achieve her dreams."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yup! I couldn't be prouder to call her my mom!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I wanna be the top Umamusume in
all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
For both my mom who raised me and my mom
who gave birth to me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna show them how much I've grown and how
capable I've become! And I wanna do so while
feeling proud!
choice_data_list: All right, let's give it everything we've got!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay! First things first, we should focus on my
debut!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Let's do this, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my journey with Special Week as she
seeks to become the top Umamusume in all of
Japan begins!
